3:
The people of Camp Tranquil are understandably nervous, but Kan–E–Senna's calming presence seems to be having a positive effect.

※You must be accompanied by Kan–E–Senna to complete this task. Speak with her again should you become separated.

9:
It will take some time before Kan–E–Senna is ready to commune with the great one. In the meantime, her attendant asks that you prepare both mentally and physically.

※The next role quest will be available from the Keeper of the Entwined Serpents upon reaching level 87 in any tank class.
